title: ConstructionIQ
intent: Construction project risk, budget, timeline, and resource intelligence
requirements: projects module fully implemented with backend, frontend, tests
site-reports module fully implemented with backend, frontend, tests
milestones module fully implemented with backend, frontend, tests
safety module fully implemented with backend, frontend, tests
change-orders module fully implemented with backend, frontend, tests

No TODO/stub placeholders in production paths
acceptance_criteria: All listed modules available in UI + API
